summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 48 • Sleep 58 • Strain 8%

Read
The night gave you enough rest, but recovery is only middling, so the day opens with usable rather than abundant reserve. For muscle preservation, the conditions favor steady resistance work and enough protein over a hard deficit or output chase.

Steady reserve.

Performance: Steady reserve.
